name: socialscan

documentation.readme: socialscan offers accurate and fast checks for email address and username usage on online platforms.
usage_sections: Reserved keywords: Most platforms have a set of keywords that they don't allow to be used in usernames
Deleted/banned accounts: Deleted/banned account usernames tend to be unavailable even though the profile pages might not exist

arguments.name: -a
arguments.description: only print usernames/email addresses that are

arguments.name: -c
arguments.description: cache tokens for platforms requiring more than one

arguments.description: cache tokens for platforms requiring more than one

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

arguments.name: --port
arguments.description: Target port (default: service default).

arguments.name: --interface
arguments.description: Network interface to bind to (e.g. wlan0mon, eth0).

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report or capture.

arguments.name: --threads
arguments.description: Number of concurrent workers.

arguments.name: --timeout
arguments.description: Per-operation timeout in seconds.

arguments.name: --rate
arguments.description: Packet / request rate limit (packets/sec).

arguments.name: --wordlist
arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.name: --proxy
arguments.description: HTTP or SOCKS proxy URL for outbound requests.

arguments.name: --user-agent
arguments.description: HTTP User-Agent header value.

arguments.name: --cookie
arguments.description: HTTP Cookie header value.

arguments.name: --header
arguments.description: Extra HTTP header in key:value form (repeatable).

arguments.name: --insecure
arguments.description: Skip TLS certificate verification (lab use only).

examples: usage: socialscan [list of usernames/email addresses to check]

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with thewhiteh4t/seeker (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with devanshbatham/ParamSpider (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with bhushanD123/IVS_RECON (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='recon'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use:
Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web] in the OSINT category. Fits when the engagement needs: socialscan
[![Build Status](https://travis-ci.com/iojw/socialscan.svg?token=4yLRbSuqAQqrjanbzeXs&branch=master)](https://travis-ci.com/iojw/socialscan)
[![Downloads](https://pepy.tech/badge/socialscan)](https://pepy.tech.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: socialscan offers accurate and fast checks for email address and username usage on online platforms.
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `usage: socialscan [list of usernames/email addresses to check]`. Further invocations from upstream: `HTTP request (Snapchat, GitHub, Instagram. Lastfm &`.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.
